records.output_text:
You have been playing with each other recently when looking at how much better our memory has become than we were used otherwise. Now imagine what would happen for people who didn't play around long enough while they played games like Dune 3 because after 30 minutes I'd forgotten about their time spent fighting against me again now? We could lose some pretty good memories...

REFUSTATION:
If anyone else needs more information please report them here :

records.source_window_text:
You have been playing with each other recently when looking at how much better our memory has become than we were used otherwise. Now imagine what would happen for people who didn't play around long enough while they played games like Dune 3 because after 30 minutes I'd forgotten about their time spent fighting against me again now? We could lose some pretty good memories...
